features: Compatibility: Tablet Case for iPad 6th/5th Generation 2018/2017, Air 2 2014, Pro 9.7'' 2016, model (A1893 / A1954 / A1822 / A1823 / A1566 / A1567 / A1673 / A1674 / A1675). It will not fit any other models (Screen Protector NOT included)

Full Body Protection & Dust-proof Design: This Case for iPad 6th/5th Gen/ Air 2/ Pro 9.7'' is made up with hard PC frame, magnetic PU leather cover and soft TPU bumper. All-round protection design to keep your tablet away from scratches, shocks, dusts and drop damages

Multi-angle Adjustable Magnetic Stand: The case can offer 7 angles of support, so that you can always find the most comfortable angle for viewing/typing/drawing. And it can also be adsorbed to fridge door or other metal surface to help free your hands, especially convenient for cooking in the kitchen

Auto Sleep/Wake & Card Slot: The magnetic leather cover provides auto sleep/wake function, convenient for daily use and helps extend your tablet's standby time. 2 card solts are available to help keep your cards or other accessories organized and on hand

Precise Cutouts / Pencil Holder: Easy access to all buttons, controls, cameras and ports without removing the case for iPad 9.7 inch. Built-in pencil holder for easy pencil storage and accessible for note-taking/ drawing (Pencil NOT included)

Case for iPad 6th/5h Generation/ Air 2/ Pro 9.7'' Merchant video COMPATIBILITY: ONLY for iPad 6th/5th Generation 9.7'' 2018/2017, iPad Air 2 2014 & iPad Pro 9.7 inch 2016. Model: A1893/ A1954/ A1822/ A1823/ A1566/ A1567/ A1673/ A1674/ A1675. NOTICE: Pencil or Screen Protector is NOT included! NOT compatible with iPad Pro/Air 6th/5th generation or any other model. Multifunctional iPad 9.7 inch magnetic cover Support Auto Sleep/Wake Function The magnetic smart cover offers automatic sleep / wake function to help save the power of your iPad 9.7 for longer standby time. Easy magnetic buckle helps to lock the front cover stably and adds another layer protection when the iPad is not being used. Multi-Angles Adjustable Stand The magnetic stand can be set to 7 different angles and support your iPad 6th/5th generation, iPad Air 2 & iPad Pro 9.7 stably. No matter you want to type, watch videos or surf the web, the stand extremely helps improve comfort and gives you ideal hands-free using experience. Previous page Notice: iPad Pencil is NOT included! The Pencil Holder and Card Slots make it convenient to keep your accessories organized and on hand. Viewing / Typing / Flat Angle Convenient for office working, watching movies, drawing and Internet surfing, etc. Easy Access to All Buttons, Controls & Ports Next page 1 Pencil Holder & Card Slot 2 Multi-Angles Stand 3 Precise Cutouts Sleek & Modern Design, Easy to Carry Around and Travel with Suitable for everyone from business professionals to students and artists. Auto Adsorbing Magnetic Stand The strong magnetic stand cover can be adsorbed to fridge door or other iron surface like a suction cup, helping free your hands and making it more convenient for you to cook in the kitchen. All Round Protection, Keep Your iPad 9.7 Safe From Drops, Shocks or Scratches The soft TPU edge and the high strength PC support frame can maximize avoid your iPad being damaged. If you frequently use iPad 6th/5th, iPad Air 2 or iPad Pro 9.7 for outdoor working, travelling or business, or just in case kids accidentally drop the iPad, this case will be an ideal choice for you.
